      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "2. Use &#96;AppName&#96; parameter for application isolation\n\n## Usage Examples\n\n### Example 1: Using Configuration-Driven Agent\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\nimport (\n    \"context\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"\n    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"\n)\n\n// 1. Load configuration\n_, err := config.Load(\"config/config.yaml\")\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 2. Create Agent from config (automatically reads ChatModel config)\nagent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx)\nif err != nil {\n    return err\n}\n\n// 3. Use Agent\nresult, err := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统\")\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Example 2: Application Isolation\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\npersistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\n// Travel Agent\nresult, _ := persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"travel booking platform\",\n    ProjectName: \"TravelApp\",\n    AppName:     \"travel\",  // 隔离存储\n})\n// Stores to: storage/app/ui_ux/travel/design-system/travelapp/MASTER.md\n\n// Stock Agent\nresult, _ := persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"stock analysis\",\n    ProjectName: \"StockApp\",\n    AppName:     \"stock\",  // 隔离存储\n})\n// Stores to: storage/app/ui_ux/stock/design-system/stockapp/MASTER.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Example 3: Custom Storage Path\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\npersistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)\n\nresult, _ := persistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"beauty spa\",\n    ProjectName: \"Serenity Spa\",\n    BaseDir:     \"/custom/path/to/storage\",  // 自定义路径\n    AppName:     \"beauty_app\",\n})\n// Stores to: /custom/path/to/storage/beauty_app/design-system/serenity-spa/MASTER.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Technical Details\n\n### Environment Variable Processing\n\nThe new configuration supports environment variable substitution using &#96;${VAR_NAME}&#96; format:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\nChatModel:\n  Config:\n    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"  # 从环境变量读取\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe system will:\n1. Check if the value matches &#96;${VAR_NAME}&#96; pattern\n2. Look up the environment variable\n3. Use the environment value if found, otherwise use the literal string",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "│           ├── MASTER.md\n│           └── pages/\n│               └── {page}.md\n└── design-system/           # 默认共享存储（未指定 AppName）\n    └── {project}/\n        ├── MASTER.md\n        └── pages/\n            └── {page}.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Path Priority**:\n1. Call-time &#96;BaseDir&#96; parameter (highest priority)\n2. Configuration file &#96;UIUX.Storage.BaseDir&#96;\n3. Default value: &#96;storage/app/ui_ux&#96;\n\n### 3. Application/Agent Isolation\n\n**New Feature**: Support for isolating design systems by application or agent name\n\n**Usage**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;go\n// Travel Agent\npersistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"travel booking platform\",\n    ProjectName: \"TravelApp\",\n    AppName:     \"travel\",  // 隔离存储\n})\n\n// Stock Agent\npersistTool.Invoke(ctx, \u0026ui_ux.PersistDesignSystemRequest{\n    Query:       \"stock analysis dashboard\",\n    ProjectName: \"StockApp\",\n    AppName:     \"stock\",  // 隔离存储\n})\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Storage Result**:\n- Travel: &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/travel/design-system/travelapp/MASTER.md&#96;\n- Stock: &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/stock/design-system/stockapp/MASTER.md&#96;\n\n**Benefits**:\n- ✅ Prevents conflicts between different applications/agents\n- ✅ Suitable for multi-tenant scenarios\n- ✅ Optional isolation: If &#96;AppName&#96; is not specified, uses shared storage\n\n## Components Modified\n\n### Configuration Files\n- &#96;config/config.go&#96;: \n  - Simplified &#96;ChatModelConfig&#96; structure (from 3 separate configs to unified &#96;Type + Config&#96;)\n  - Added &#96;UIUXConfig&#96; and &#96;UIUXStorageConfig&#96; structures\n- &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;: \n  - Updated ChatModel configuration format\n  - Added &#96;UIUX.Storage&#96; configuration section\n\n### UI/UX Tool Files\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/persistence.go&#96;: \n  - Updated &#96;NewPersistenceManager&#96; to accept &#96;appName&#96; parameter\n  - Added support for reading base directory from configuration\n  - Added &#96;GetBaseDir()&#96; and &#96;GetAppName()&#96; getter methods\n- &#96;tools/ui_ux/tool.go&#96;: \n  - Updated &#96;PersistDesignSystemRequest&#96; to include &#96;AppName&#96; field",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "│           ├── MASTER.md"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,

            "lineNumber": 73,

            "text": "└── design-system/           # 默认共享存储（未指定 AppName）"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    └── {project}/"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,

          },

            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "1. Call-time &#96;BaseDir&#96; parameter (highest priority)"
          },

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


编译通过。已添加以下功能：

## 已完成的功能

### 1. **发送图片消息** (`SendWeChatImageMessage`)
- 方法：`SendWeChatImageMessage(ctx, req)`
- 请求参数：`SendWeChatImageMessageRequest`（包含 `MediaID`）
- 支持单个用户或批量发送

### 2. **发送小程序卡片消息** (`SendWeChatMiniProgramPage`)
- 方法：`SendWeChatMiniProgramPage(ctx, req)`
- 请求参数：`SendWeChatMiniProgramPageRequest`（包含 `Title`、`AppID`、`PagePath`、`ThumbMediaID`）
- 小程序配置可通过 `config.yaml` 设置，请求中也可覆盖
- 配置字段：
  - `MiniProgram.AppID`：小程序 AppID
  - `MiniProgram.DefaultPath`：默认页面路径
  - `MiniProgram.ThumbMediaID`：封面图片的 media_id

### 3. **发送图文链接消息** (`SendWeChatLinkMessage`)
- 方法：`SendWeChatLinkMessage(ctx, req)`
- 请求参数：`SendWeChatLinkMessageRequest`（包含 `Articles` 数组）
- 支持单条图文消息（微信限制）

### 4. **代码优化**
- 提取通用函数 `sendMessageRequest`，统一处理 HTTP 请求和错误处理
- 重构 `sendTextMessageToUser`，使用通用函数
- 所有方法保持一致的错误处理和响应格式

## 配置示例

在 `config.yaml` 中可以添加小程序配置：

```yaml
WeChat:
  Enabled: true
  AppID: "your_appid"
  AppSecret: "your_app_secret"
  OpenIDs: []
  TokenFilePath: "storage/app/wechat/access_token.json"
  MiniProgram:
    AppID: "your_miniprogram_appid"
    DefaultPath: "pages/index/index"
    ThumbMediaID: "your_thumb_media_id"
```

所有功能已实现并通过编译检查。代码遵循现有代码风格，错误处理与现有实现一致。

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

是的，代码中已有错误处理。如果小程序 AppID 未配置，会返回明确的错误提示。

在 `SendWeChatMiniProgramPage` 函数中（第 197-203 行），逻辑如下：

1. 先检查请求参数中是否有 `AppID`
2. 如果没有，从配置文件中读取 `cfg.WeChat.MiniProgram.AppID`
3. 如果配置中也没有，返回错误：`"appid is required (either in request or config)"`

同样，`PagePath` 和 `ThumbMediaID` 也有类似的检查：
- `PagePath` 未配置：返回 `"pagepath is required (either in request or config)"`
- `ThumbMediaID` 未配置：返回 `"thumb_media_id is required (either in request or config)"`

因此，如果小程序 AppID 未配置（既不在请求中，也不在配置文件中），函数会在发送前返回错误，不会调用微信 API。错误信息会明确指出需要在请求参数或配置文件中提供该值。
